video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Silverbrook (androgynous guild coordinator in formal cloak) and Yuna Mistfell (masculine guild crafter in rolled-sleeve apron); Yuna Silverbrook steadies a shield on the workbench while Yuna Mistfell guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot; Yuna Mistfell taps the final harmless repair mark while Yuna Silverbrook holds the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm wood textures, consistent lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The scene depicts professional cooperation in a fantasy setting. No sexual or violent content. No text or watermarks included.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Yuna Silverbrook assists Yuna Mistfell with a forge repair task to maintain guild gear efficiency.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Professional collaboration in the forge builds mutual trust.
